description: Vendor tracking manifest for Pi extensions. Strategies: mirror (clean copy, sync from upstream), patch-stack (small local mods on top of upstream), fork (heavily modified, upstream informational only), local (our own, no upstream).

pi-channels.notes: Byte-for-byte match with upstream. Sync by replacing.

pi-cron.notes: Byte-for-byte match with upstream. Sync by replacing.

pi-webserver.notes: Byte-for-byte match with upstream. Sync by replacing.

pi-telemetry.notes: Byte-for-byte match with upstream. Sync by replacing.

pi-go.ts.notes: Local OpenCode Go API key rotator. No upstream.

patches: workon:switch event handler for re-bootstrap on project switch
lastCtx tracking for UI context in workon:switch

diffFiles.note: .js→.ts imports rewrites for Pi TS loading.
.js→.ts imports rewrites for local module imports.
.js→.ts imports rewrites plus session_start reason handling, lastCtx tracking, and workon:switch re-bootstrap.
.js→.ts type import rewrite.
.js→.ts imports rewrites for config/git helpers.
.js→.ts imports rewrites for client handles.

pi-honcho-memory.notes: Upstream is npm package @agney/pi-honcho-memory. We vendor the extensions/ dir directly.

patches: src/tracker.ts: captures prompt via before_agent_start, falls back to ctx.model

diffFiles.note: Captures prompts via before_agent_start, falls back to ctx.model, broadens completion handling, and reads response/usage from newer event shapes.
Escapes status values before rendering the jobs table HTML.
Clamps limit/days query params to bounded ranges before querying stats.

pi-jobs.notes: Small functional additions on top of upstream.

patches: Filesystem-only mode (no Obsidian REST API dependency)

diffFiles.note: Config example docs were rewritten for generic vaultPath/vaultName and no apiKey.
Config example docs were rewritten for generic vaultPath/vaultName and no apiKey.
Adds filesystem-only config/docs, symlink escape hardening, multiline frontmatter replacement, and a custom daily note template.

pi-vault.notes: Core vault tool from upstream, adapted for filesystem-only operation.

patches: Exports buildProjectContext for use by other extensions

diffFiles.note: Exports buildProjectContext to the slash command path, caches ctx, and updates the status bar on startup/workon:switch.
Exports buildProjectContext for reuse outside the tool module.

pi-workon.notes: Small functional extensions on top of upstream.

diffFiles.note: Replaces single-layer memory injection with separate global/project memory blocks and instructions.
Splits storage into global and project base paths and includes both scopes in memory file discovery.
Initializes separate global/project memory roots and updates project scope on workon:switch.
Adds explicit global/project scope selection and defaults writes to project scope when active.

pi-memory.notes: Major rewrite to two-layer memory (global + project scope). Different data model, write semantics, path layout, and workon:switch integration. Upstream useful for ideas only; manual semantic merging required.

patches: thinking support from agent frontmatter/call-site override
Pool usage accumulation from dead agents

diffFiles.note: Reads a thinking field from agent frontmatter and passes it through discovery.
Accumulates usage from killed agents so pool totals include dead-agent work.
Raises the default isolated-agent timeout from 10 minutes to 30 minutes.
Uses agent-level thinking defaults, enriches subagent:complete payloads, extends project-agent confirmation, and returns full parallel outputs.
Adds an optional thinking field to agent configs.

pi-subagent.notes: Architecture same as upstream. Additive patches, not a rewrite.

diffFiles.note: Complete rewrite from single-thread state to slot-based persisted side sessions with archive, legacy migration, and inject/summarize flow.

btw.ts.notes: Complete rewrite from single-thread model to slot-based persisted state with archive, legacy migration, disposeGeneration, and inject/summarize flow. Upstream useful for API migration patterns only.

diffFiles.note: .js→.ts imports for Pi TS loading

pi-lens.notes: Critical extension for inline code diagnostics. Updated from v2.2.10 to v3.8.22.
